commands.evidence: strict LCA QuillenExactCategory instance, explicit-to-chosen biproduct bridge, diagonal/codiagonal API, coordinatewise strict biproduct exactness, and pullback/pushout exactness are available locally.

local exact-category YonedaExt quotient exposes relation generators, Rel.refl, split-zero, split-factor zero, relation-membership addition, witnessed Baer-chain addition, left-head Baer addition after a fixed positive tail, left one-fold splice product on quotients, split-left-factor product zero, left-head iso and Baer additivity for one-fold and positive-chain left products, fixed positive-chain left splice on the right quotient, split fixed-positive-chain product zero, baer_sum API compatibility theorems, chosen-biproduct product-extension API, and canonical MetrizableLCA BaerSumData for arbitrary one-fold extension pairs.

strict LCA exact category exposes coordinatewise strict biproduct exactness, explicit-to-chosen biproduct bridge, diagonal/codiagonal API, product extensions for pairs of one-fold MetrizableLCA extensions on chosen binary biproduct endpoints, pullback/pushout extension constructors, canonical BaerSumData, local YonedaExt quotient relations, split-zero equality, split-factor zero equality, relation-membership addition equality, witnessed Baer-chain addition equality, left-head Baer addition after a fixed positive tail, left one-fold and fixed positive-chain splice products on the right quotient, left-head iso and Baer additivity for those products, split-left-factor and split-positive-chain product zero, baer_sum compatibility, and Dbounded localization declarations.
